blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,336 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
